articles.author: David Rising
articles.title: Asia’s defense summit opens with China and doubts about US priorities topping concerns - AP News
articles.description: China's military modernization and assertiveness in the Indo-Pacific are key topics at Asia's top defense summit. The Shangri-La Dialogue, hosted by the International Institute for Strategic Studies, will also address tensions in the Middle East and Russia's …
articles.content: SINGAPORE (AP) Chinas rapid military modernization and assertiveness in the Indo-Pacific and growing concerns over American priorities are top issues on the table at Asias premier defense summit draw… [+4879 chars]
